_meta.description: Mutation audit trail rules for travel, accommodation, and transport modules.
sources: AGENTS.md — 'Every mutation to travel/accommodation/transport writes to the audit log'

core_rule.statement: Every mutation (create, update, delete) to travel, accommodation, or transport data MUST produce an audit log entry. The audit log is append-only.
core_rule.source: AGENTS.md: 'Every mutation to travel/accommodation/transport writes to the audit log.'

rules.rule: CREATE operations on travel/accommodation/transport records MUST write an audit entry
UPDATE operations on travel/accommodation/transport records MUST write an audit entry capturing before/after state
DELETE operations on travel/accommodation/transport records MUST write an audit entry
Audit log entries MUST be append-only. No audit entry may be modified or deleted.
Audit log entries MUST include: timestamp (UTC), user/actor, action type, affected record ID, eventId, and change details
rules.note: Exact schema fields NEEDS_HUMAN_DECISION if Bemi handles this automatically vs manual logging.

red_flag_integration.description: Mutations to travel/accommodation/transport may trigger red flag creation or state changes.
red_flag_integration.source: AGENTS.md — Red Flags Table; research-hub/DESIGN_DECISIONS.md — UX Decision 2

cascade_integration.description: Travel mutations MUST emit conference/travel.updated Inngest event, which triggers downstream flag accommodation + recalculate transport + notify delegate.

negative_tests.description: Update a travel record and verify an audit entry exists — missing entry is critical failure
Attempt to delete or modify an existing audit entry — MUST be rejected
Create accommodation record and verify red flag lifecycle fields are populated if applicable
